untranslatable_reason: This signal requires portfolio-level constructs (beta calculation, asset allocation weighting, leverage application, Sharpe ratio optimization) that cannot be expressed using single-asset price/technical indicators. The rule describes a multi-asset portfolio rebalancing strategy with systematic risk measurement and leverage adjustment. Available indicators only support single-asset price action analysis. Required constructs: (1) Beta/systematic risk measurement across multiple assets, (2) Portfolio allocation weights (23% stocks / 77% bonds), (3) Leverage application (1.8x), (4) Sharpe ratio calculation and optimization. These require portfolio analytics not available in the single-asset indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal represents a sophisticated risk-parity portfolio construction strategy. Entry conditions describe a structural portfolio reallocation based on beta analysis and leverage optimization, not tradeable price-level signals. Exit condition marked 'AUTHOR_SILENT' with no operational definition. This signal is fundamentally a portfolio management rule rather than a technical entry/exit signal and cannot be converted to the backtest engine's single-instrument technical indicator framework.
